name: humanspec_MUC4_VNTR_gorilla
description: Human-specific duplicon contrast: MUC4_VNTR. Status in Gorilla gorilla: 'ape_lineage_VNTR'. In human (GRCh38) the locus sits on chr3:~195.1 Mb; in this ape the syntenic region is approximated on chr3. Used by LLmap to refuse silent absorption of human-vs-ape divergence when mapping cross-species reads.

architecture.internal_structure: Reference contrast for MUC4_VNTR. See Dennis 2012, Suntsova 2017, T2T-ape 2024 for duplicon-by-duplicon presence calls.

related_diseases: human-specific cortex expansion / neurodevelopmental dosage (e.g. MUC4_VNTR)
